Packet Buffer Reference
Table Summary
Concepts
Buffer Fundamentals Microbursts Trident+ Trident II Deep Buffer Nokia SR (FP4/FP5) Nokia Access/Agg

Cisco Nexus 3548

The Cisco Nexus 3548 uses an algorithmic buffer (Cisco's ASIC, not Broadcom merchant silicon). The buffer is dynamically managed.

Field Value
Ports 48 SFP+
RX Queues 4Q
Total Buffer 18 MB
TX Buffer 5.8 MB

The Nexus 3548 is notable for its ultra-low latency mode and configurable buffer allocation.

References

  • Nexus 3548 Architecture

← Back to the main buffer table

Source: Jim Warner, UCSC (archived 2014). Information is by rumor, innuendo, and extrapolation. Manufacturers rarely publish packet buffer data in their data sheets.
